title: Glade Candle 4 oz Pine Wonderland Juniper Berry Scented Candle
features: 1. Stimulate the senses with a saturated essential oils scented candle glade fragrance. 2. Discover the Glade candles developed by perfume makers. 3. The scented candles are made from plant wax* (*Contains approx. 60% RSPO certified palm wax). 4. Stylish glass packaging. 5. Increase energy in any room with phthalate, parabens and formaldehyde candles.
description: Glade Pine Wonderland Awaken your senses with a bitter sweet pine fragrance mixed with the forest fragrance juniper berry. Introducing our latest Glade scented candles. Experience positive energy in your space with fresh, original fragrances designed to tickle your fun side and fight unpleasant odours. The Glade scented candles have been masterfully designed to quickly fill the room with perfect fragrance and shine. Developed by masters of perfumery and saturated with essential oils. With a focus on attentive ingredients, our scented candles are made from plant wax* without the use of phthalates, parabens, nitro musk and formaldehyde. Supplied in recyclable cardboard packaging that contains 100% recycled materials from pocon consumers. *Contains less 60% RSPO certified palm wax.
